name: GRS Game Tag Weight Scale
description: This rule pack defines the 1-5 game tag weight scale used by GRS and GMA, including export rules and review rules.

core_principle.zh: 权重表示某个标签对游戏体验的重要程度，而不是模型判断的置信度。
core_principle.en: Weight represents how important a tag is to the game's experience, not how confident the model is.

weight.zh: 表示标签本身对游戏内容的重要程度。
weight.en: Represents the importance of the tag to the game content.

confidence.zh: 表示模型对该标签和权重判断的把握程度。
confidence.en: Represents how certain the model is about the tag and weight judgment.

example.zh: weight = 5 但 confidence = 0.62 表示模型认为该标签可能是核心体验，但证据仍需要人工重点审核。
example.en: weight = 5 and confidence = 0.62 means the model believes the tag may be core to the game, but the evidence still needs careful human review.

rules.definition_zh: 游戏中只有非常轻微或局部的该元素，通常不足以影响推荐结果。
rules.definition_en: The element appears only lightly or locally and usually should not affect recommendation results.
use_when: 该元素只在极少数场景中出现
该元素不是主要玩法、主要氛围或主要卖点
证据很弱，但可以作为建模参考记录

export_policy.reason_zh: 1 分标签默认只作为候选弱相关标签，不进入最终 GRS game_tags。
export_policy.reason_en: Weight-1 tags are weak candidate tags and should not be exported to final GRS game_tags by default.

review_policy.review_hint_zh: 如果人工认为该标签对推荐确实有价值，应考虑是否提升到 3；否则保持不导出。
review_policy.review_hint_en: If a reviewer believes this tag is useful for recommendation, consider raising it to 3; otherwise keep it unexported.

rules.definition_zh: 游戏中有一定体现，但不是主要体验，通常不应作为推荐主数据。
rules.definition_en: The element is present, but not a main experience, and usually should not be part of the main recommendation data.
use_when: 该元素存在并有一定证据
该元素能辅助理解游戏，但不是主要体验
该标签如果进入推荐数据，可能带来一定噪音

export_policy.reason_zh: 2 分标签默认不进入最终 GRS game_tags，只作为审核参考；除非人工确认它对推荐有实际价值。
export_policy.reason_en: Weight-2 tags are not exported to final GRS game_tags by default and are mainly used as review references unless manually confirmed.

review_policy.review_hint_zh: 如果该标签确实能稳定描述游戏体验，应提升到 3；如果只是局部体现，应保持不导出。
review_policy.review_hint_en: If this tag reliably describes the game experience, raise it to 3; if it is only locally present, keep it unexported.

rules.definition_zh: 该标签能较好描述游戏体验，是理解游戏的重要维度之一。
rules.definition_en: The tag clearly describes the game experience and is one important dimension of understanding the game.
use_when: 该元素是游戏的重要组成部分
玩家较容易通过该标签理解游戏体验
证据较充分，但该标签不一定是最核心卖点

export_policy.reason_zh: 3 分及以上标签属于 GRS 推荐主数据，可进入最终 game_tags。
export_policy.reason_en: Tags with weight 3 or above are part of the main GRS recommendation data and can be exported to final game_tags.

review_policy.review_hint_zh: 如果证据不足或标签数量过多，仍建议人工审核。
review_policy.review_hint_en: Human review is still recommended if evidence is weak or too many tags are selected.

rules.definition_zh: 该标签是游戏的重要体验之一，明显影响玩家对游戏的判断。
rules.definition_en: The tag is one of the game's major experiences and strongly affects how players understand the game.
use_when: 该元素是主要玩法、主要氛围或主要体验之一
游戏宣传、页面描述、评论摘要或玩法结构都明显支持该标签
缺少该标签会明显误读游戏

export_policy.reason_zh: 4 分标签应默认进入最终 GRS game_tags。
export_policy.reason_en: Weight-4 tags should be exported to final GRS game_tags by default.

review_policy.review_hint_zh: 如果多个标签都被评为 4 或 5，需要检查是否存在过度建模。
review_policy.review_hint_en: If many tags are rated 4 or 5, check whether the game is being over-modeled.

rules.definition_zh: 该标签是理解这个游戏的关键，属于最核心的体验特征之一。
rules.definition_en: The tag is essential to understanding the game and represents one of its core experience pillars.
use_when: 该元素是游戏最主要的吸引力之一
大多数玩家或页面资料都会用类似概念描述该游戏
没有该标签会严重误导推荐系统

export_policy.reason_zh: 5 分标签必须进入最终 GRS game_tags，除非人工审核后明确移除。
export_policy.reason_en: Weight-5 tags must be exported to final GRS game_tags unless explicitly removed during human review.

review_policy.review_hint_zh: 5 分应非常克制使用。通常一个游戏不应有过多 5 分标签。
review_policy.review_hint_en: Weight 5 should be used carefully. A game should usually not have too many weight-5 tags.

review_required_when.reason_zh: 导出标签过少，可能无法充分描述游戏体验。
review_required_when.reason_en: Too few exported tags may not describe the game experience sufficiently.

review_required_when.reason_zh: 导出标签过多，可能导致推荐噪音或标签数量偏置。
review_required_when.reason_en: Too many exported tags may introduce recommendation noise or tag-count bias.

review_required_when.reason_zh: 不在推荐范围内，但仍在允许范围内，需要轻度审核。
review_required_when.reason_en: Outside the recommended range but still allowed; light review is required.

guidelines.zh: 不要为了凑数量而加入 1–2 分弱相关标签。
guidelines.en: Do not add weight-1 or weight-2 weak tags just to reach the recommended tag count.

guidelines.zh: 复杂游戏可以有 6–7 个导出标签，但需要确保每个标签都有明确证据。
guidelines.en: Complex games may have 6-7 exported tags, but each tag must have clear evidence.

guidelines.zh: 体验非常集中的游戏可以只有 3 个导出标签，但需要确认没有遗漏核心维度。
guidelines.en: Highly focused games may have only 3 exported tags, but reviewers should ensure no core dimension is missing.

guidelines.zh: 最终进入 GRS game_tags 的标签通常应为 3–5 分。
guidelines.en: Tags exported to final GRS game_tags should usually have weights from 3 to 5.

default_rules.description_zh: 3–5 分标签默认进入 GRS 推荐主数据。
default_rules.description_en: Tags with weights 3-5 are exported to the main GRS recommendation data by default.

default_rules.description_zh: 1–2 分标签默认只作为候选弱相关标签，不进入最终 GRS game_tags。
default_rules.description_en: Tags with weights 1-2 are weak candidate tags and are not exported to final GRS game_tags by default.

manual_override.description_zh: 人工审核可以覆盖默认导出策略，但必须留下审核理由。
manual_override.description_en: Human reviewers may override the default export policy, but must provide a review reason.

global_guidelines.zh: 不要给太多标签 5 分。5 分只应给核心体验。
global_guidelines.en: Do not assign too many weight-5 tags. Weight 5 should be reserved for core experiences.

global_guidelines.zh: 推荐导出 4–6 个主要标签，允许 3–7 个，超出范围必须审核。
global_guidelines.en: Exporting 4-6 main tags is recommended; 3-7 is allowed; outside this range requires review.

global_guidelines.zh: 1–2 分标签可以作为 GMA 候选建议出现，但默认不进入 GRS 最终推荐数据。
global_guidelines.en: Weight-1 and weight-2 tags may appear as GMA candidate suggestions, but are not exported to final GRS recommendation data by default.

global_guidelines.zh: 如果一个 1–2 分标签被人工确认应该进入 GRS，通常应考虑是否将权重提升到 3。
global_guidelines.en: If a weight-1 or weight-2 tag is manually confirmed for export to GRS, reviewers should consider whether it should be raised to weight 3.

global_guidelines.zh: 如果证据不足，应该降低 confidence 或标记审核，而不是随意调整 weight。
global_guidelines.en: If evidence is insufficient, lower confidence or mark for review instead of arbitrarily changing weight.

global_guidelines.zh: 标签必须来自 GRS 现有标签集合，不能创建新标签。
global_guidelines.en: Tags must come from the existing GRS tag set. New tags are not allowed.

confidence_scale.definition: Confidence measures how certain the model is about the suggested tag and weight.

guidelines.review_hint_zh: 通常可以接受，但仍应通过基础校验。
guidelines.review_hint_en: Usually acceptable, but should still pass basic validation.

guidelines.meaning_zh: 证据较充分，但仍建议人工确认
guidelines.meaning_en: Reasonable evidence, but human review is still recommended
guidelines.review_hint_zh: 适合进入人工审核列表。

guidelines.meaning_zh: 证据有限，需要重点审核
guidelines.review_hint_zh: 不应自动导出，除非人工确认。
guidelines.review_hint_en: Should not be automatically exported unless manually confirmed.

guidelines.meaning_en: Insufficient evidence; not recommended for acceptance
guidelines.review_hint_zh: 建议移除或触发二次分析。

validation_rules.description_zh: 最终导出标签推荐数量为 4–6 个。
validation_rules.description_en: The recommended number of exported tags is 4-6.

validation_rules.description_zh: 最终导出标签允许数量为 3–7 个；超出范围必须审核。
validation_rules.description_en: The allowed number of exported tags is 3-7; outside this range requires review.

validation_rules.description_zh: 1–2 分标签默认不得进入最终 GRS game_tags。
validation_rules.description_en: Weight-1 and weight-2 tags must not be exported to final GRS game_tags by default.

validation_rules.description_zh: 如果 5 分标签超过 3 个，需要人工审核是否过度建模。
validation_rules.description_en: If more than 3 tags have weight 5, human review is required to check for over-modeling.

validation_rules.description_zh: 每个建议标签都必须有至少一个证据片段。
validation_rules.description_en: Every suggested tag must include at least one evidence snippet.
